metadata.description: ScopeBlind governance plugins for Claude Code: fail-closed policy gating and offline-verifiable signed receipts for agent tool calls.

plugins.name: protect-mcp
plugins.description: Fail-closed Cedar policy gate plus Ed25519 signed receipts for every tool call. Denies on any policy error, and proves the gate is live with a startup self-test. Receipts verify offline with no vendor trust.
